tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Chords [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't have to leave this town to see the world[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause it's something that I gotta do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna look back in 30 years[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
And wonder who you're married to[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]C[/ch]
Wanna say it now, wanna make it clear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
For only you and God to hear[/tab]
[tab]                                            [ch]F[/ch]
When you love someone, they say you set 'em free[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
But that ain't gonna work for me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna live without you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't wanna even breathe[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I don't wanna dream about you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
Wanna wake up with you next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I don't wanna go down any other road now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Lookin' in your eyes now, if I had to die now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]

You


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
All the wasted days, all the wasted nights[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
I blame it all on being young[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Got no regrets 'cause it got me here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
But I don't wanna waste another one[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I been thinkin' about what I want in my life[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
It begins and ends the same[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
If I had to choose what I couldn't lose[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
There'd only be one thing[/tab]
